New — v2.4 released

The dashboard
teams actually ship with.

Launch an operator-grade surface in minutes. No config, no sprawl. 12 pages, every breakpoint.

Features

Built for teams that ship.

A11y
WCAG 2.1 AA across all pages.
Animations
60fps, reduced-motion aware.
SEO
OpenGraph, JSON-LD, sitemap.
Analytics
Umami/Plausible-ready.
Components
40+ reusable sections.
Visual Breakpoints
Desktop, tablet, mobile.
